data.title: Horse Powertrain Reveals X-Range C15 Direct Drive Powertrain for Hybridizing BEV Platforms
data.description: Beijing-based Horse Powertrain, known for innovative and eco-friendly powertrain systems, is set to introduce a groundbreaking product at the Beijing Auto Show 2026. The X-Range C15 Direct Drive is an all-in-one powertrain that combines a full hybrid system featuring a 4-cylinder engine, transmission, power electronics, and an electric motor. This unique design consolidates these components into a single compact unit with a common housing. It is intended for mounting to the rear subframe for a dual isolated installation.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
data.description: Futures experienced a decline as oil prices surged due to Iran's strict control over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump revealed plans for new discussions on Monday. Tesla's upcoming earnings report is also generating anticipation. The Dow Jones Futures dropped amid these developments.

data.title: Monopar Presents Phase 3 Data Showing Greater Neurologic Benefit with ALXN1840 vs SoC in Wilson Disease Patients with Neurologic Symptoms at AAN 2026
data.description: Monopar Therapeutics Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded under Nasdaq as MNPR, revealed new findings from the Phase 3 FoCus trial of ALXN1840 (tiomolibdate choline, TMC) during the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting 2026 in Wilmette, Illinois. The trial showcased improved neurologic outcomes for Wilson disease patients with initial neurologic symptoms compared to those on standard care. The event occurred on April 19, 2026, as part of the presentation at the AAN conference, which runs from April 18-22, 2026.

data.title: Amplitude Research Reveals a Generational AI Trust Gap is Costing Australian Businesses
data.description: A recent study conducted by Amplitude in Sydney uncovered a notable disparity in trust towards AI among different generations within Australian businesses.

data.title: Xenon Presents Azetukalner Phase 3 X-TOLE2 Study Results and 48-Month Long-term Data in Focal Onset Seizures at 2026 AAN Annual Meeting
data.description: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc. shared positive results from the Phase 3 X-TOLE2 study on the efficacy and safety of azetukalner in treating focal onset seizures (FOS) at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting in Chicago. The study showcased the potential benefits of Azetukalner (AZK), a K V 7 potassium channel opener, in managing epilepsy. Additionally, data from the ongoing X-TOLE open-label extension (OLE) study after 48 months and real-world evidence highlighted the value of no-titration options like AZK in epilepsy care. Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a neuroscience-focused biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol XENE, is committed to developing life-changing therapeutics for patients.

data.title: KIMMTRAK doubles the likelihood of being alive at five years for first line HLA-A*02:01+ patients with metastatic uveal melanoma
data.description: A recent study found that the drug KIMMTRAK has shown to increase the chances of survival at the five-year mark by twofold for patients with metastatic uveal melanoma who have the HLA-A*02:01+ genotype in the first line of treatment. This development showcases a significant improvement in the survival rate for this specific group of patients, highlighting the potential efficacy of KIMMTRAK in treating metastatic uveal melanoma.

data.title: Whitehawk Therapeutics Presents Comprehensive Preclinical Data Highlighting its Next-Generation ADC Portfolio at the AACR 2026
data.description: Studies have shown promising results for HWK-007, HWK-016, and HWK-206, utilizing Whitehawk's unique Carbon Bridge Cysteine Re-pairing technology. Tumor regression was noted in different cancer models with low single-digit mg/kg doses, showing good tolerance levels. The Human No Observed Adverse Effect Level (HNSTD) was recorded at 60.
